title: Need scan of Second Impact Box 3
display_title: Need scan of Second Impact Box 3
wikitext:
[]: Need scan of Second Impact Box #3             Quote Post by svenge » Sun May 08, 2011 10:58 am I'm working on a nice-looking website detailing all the Evangelion DVD releases, and I've hit a bit of a roadblock. There's one release that I can't find/get a decent scan of: The 3rd "Second Impact Box" set from Gainax. This is the best one I could find so far, but it's not really good enough for my purposes... [URL=http://imageshack.us/photo/my-images/19/2i3n.jpg/] [/URL] Here's what I have for the other 2 boxes, I'd like to have #3 in the same size and quality give-or-take... Second Impact Box #1 SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Sun May 08, 2011 12:09 pm I have the clean illustration from CARAMINE! I could E-mail it to you.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Sun May 08, 2011 2:41 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: I have the clean illustration from CARAMINE! I could E-mail it to you.

[]:             Quote Post by shito » Sun May 15, 2011 8:45 pm http://misashito.occult-proposal.net/sib3.jpg hope it helps!

[]: Re: Need scan of Second Impact Box #3             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun May 15, 2011 9:35 pm svenge wrote: I'm working on a nice-looking website detailing all the Evangelion DVD releases...

[]: Re: Need scan of Second Impact Box #3             Quote Post by svenge » Sun May 15, 2011 9:54 pm @ Shito: THANK YOU!!! The Eva Monkey wrote: What's wrong with this? http://wiki.evageeks.org/North_American_Video_Releases

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun May 15, 2011 11:15 pm Good luck with your project, svenge ! Be sure to post the results here. (Maybe a link to EGF as reference would be nice, but of course, it's your site and all.)

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Mon May 16, 2011 12:08 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Good luck with your project, svenge ! Be sure to post the results here. (Maybe a link to EGF as reference would be nice, but of course, it's your site and all.)
